prompts.title: 奢华产品展示（万能模板）
prompts.prompt: A luxury [product] suspended in a column of crystal-clear water, slowly rotating. Water droplets cascade around it in slow motion. Soft studio lighting creates subtle reflections. The background transitions from deep navy to rich black. Commercial quality, 4K, photorealistic materials, premium aesthetic.
prompts.notes: 替换 [product] 适用于耳机/香水/运动鞋等任意产品

prompts.title: 食品饮料广告（咖啡奶油）
prompts.prompt: Extreme close-up of rich cream being poured into a dark coffee in slow motion, creating a mesmerizing vortex pattern. Steam rises gently. Warm, inviting lighting highlights the contrast between cream and coffee. The camera slowly pulls back to reveal a beautifully styled café setting. Commercial quality, appetizing color grading, 4K resolution.

prompts.title: 科技产品开箱感
prompts.prompt: A sleek [tech product] emerges from pristine white packaging in slow motion. The box opens to reveal the device nestled in premium materials. Soft light particles dance around the product as it's lifted out. Clean white background, subtle shadows, premium unboxing aesthetic, 4K quality.

prompts.title: 时尚电商 360 度环绕
prompts.prompt: A model wearing an elegant [garment] stands against an infinite white background. The fabric moves naturally as she slowly turns, revealing the drape and texture. Camera at hip height, slow 360-degree orbit. Soft, even studio lighting emphasizes the garment's details. Fashion editorial quality, 4K.

prompts.title: 奢华香水广告（多镜头）
prompts.prompt: An ultra-luxury perfume commercial with a dreamy electronic soundtrack and steady drum beats. Begin with a macro shot of a transparent rectangular glass bottle surrounded by violently swirling purple liquid. Capture the churning liquid with bubbles and splashes, accompanied by crisp water sounds. Dissolve into surface ripples of the purple liquid, then show a close-up of delicate iris flowers floating underwater. Cut to the perfume bottle tilted on a textured light surface, refracting dreamy halos. A Latina female model elegantly lifts the perfume bottle to her neck and shoulder in a pure white high-end studio, gazing into the camera.

prompts.title: 可口可乐互动故事
prompts.prompt: A narrative Coke interaction scene. A figure looks guilty, glancing left and right before peering out of frame. He quickly reaches, grabs the Coke, takes a sip, and shows a satisfied expression. Footsteps are heard as he hurriedly puts the Coke back. A cowboy then picks up the Coke and walks away. End with a close-up of the top-lit Coke against a completely black background.

prompts.title: 草图变 3D 汽车
prompts.prompt: A car sketch on paper. The camera pushes in. The sketch lines rise off the paper, gaining dimensionality and color, transforming into a photorealistic 3D car driving on a road. Smooth transformation, cinematic quality.

prompts.title: 好莱坞科幻大片风格（10s 多分镜）
prompts.prompt:
Create a 10-second cinematic sequence in a Hollywood sci-fi style with cyberpunk aesthetics, high-contrast neon lighting, and an epic score feel.

00:00–00:04 – Wide Tracking Shot: Show a futuristic Megacity canyon at night, with rain falling. An anti-gravity vehicle weaves rapidly between skyscrapers. Countless holographic ads flash, and neon reflections shimmer on glass curtain walls and the vehicle's surface. The vehicle leaves long blue light trails behind it.

00:04–00:07 – Cockpit / Tight Action Shot: The vehicle drifts sharply to avoid an obstacle. Capture sparks and mist as the fuselage grazes a building edge. Rain hits the camera lens, blown away by the high-speed airflow. Apply camera shake to emphasize speed.

00:07–00:10 – Epic Pull-Back / Crane Shot: The vehicle bursts from the narrow buildings into an open city plaza. Reveal a panoramic view of the Megacity as the vehicle flies through low clouds. A massive lens flare streaks across the frame.

Technical Parameters: 8K Ultra HD, teal-and-orange cinematic grading, HDR, complex particle effects, and realistic motion blur.

prompts.title: 满足感循环视频（水银变形）
prompts.prompt: Liquid mercury morphs into a perfect sphere, then slowly transforms into a complex geometric shape, then back to a sphere in a seamless loop. Electric blue and silver color palette. Macro lens, dramatic studio lighting, photorealistic fluid dynamics. Loop-ready motion with seamless start and end frames. 4K quality.

prompts.title: 「如果」假设场景（水晶埃菲尔铁塔）
prompts.prompt: What if the Eiffel Tower was made of crystal? Time-lapse of the transformation: the iron structure slowly crystallizes from the base upward, each section becoming transparent and refracting rainbow light. Paris skyline in the background. Golden hour lighting. Photorealistic, cinematic quality, 4K.

prompts.title: 前后对比分屏（花园改造）
prompts.prompt: Split-screen transformation video. Left side: a neglected, overgrown garden in grey, overcast light. Right side: the same garden transformed into a vibrant paradise in golden sunlight. A smooth sliding transition reveals the transformation. Cinematic quality, satisfying reveal, 4K.

prompts.title: 微缩世界（移轴小村）
prompts.prompt: A tilt-shift miniature world of a tiny village. Day transitions to night as lights flicker on in the miniature buildings. Tiny people move through the streets. The camera slowly orbits the scene. Warm, whimsical lighting, handcrafted aesthetic, cinematic quality.

prompts.title: 史诗空间揭幕（晨雾石阶）
prompts.prompt: A lone figure stands at the base of an ancient stone staircase, shrouded in thick morning fog. The camera begins at ground level and slowly tilts upward, following the staircase as it disappears into the mist. As the camera reaches the top, the fog parts to reveal a vast mountain range bathed in golden sunrise light. National Geographic documentary quality, 4K, natural color grading, cinematic depth.

prompts.title: 情感特写（银翼杀手灯光）
prompts.prompt: Extreme close-up of a woman's face in profile, Blade Runner-inspired amber and teal lighting. A single tear forms in the corner of her eye, catches the light, and slowly traces down her cheek. The camera holds perfectly still. Shallow depth of field, cinematic color grade, photorealistic skin texture, 4K resolution.

prompts.title: 动作序列（樱花武术）
prompts.prompt: A female martial artist in a flowing white silk robe performs a complex spinning kick sequence in a cherry blossom garden. Silk ribbons trail from her wrists, catching the air. Cherry blossom petals scatter with each movement. Dynamic tracking shot, slow motion at peak of each move, warm afternoon light, cinematic quality.

prompts.title: 黑色电影场景（雨夜侦探）
prompts.prompt: A detective in a long coat stands under a flickering neon sign in a rain-soaked alley, 1940s meets cyberpunk aesthetic. Neon reflections ripple across wet cobblestones. He lights a cigarette; the flame briefly illuminates sharp cheekbones and tired eyes. Inky shadows contrast with vivid neon. Handheld camera, cinematic noir, 21:9 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: 披萨店连续镜头
prompts.prompt: Single continuous cinematic shot, no music. From outside the glass window, the dim camera slowly pushes inward into a pizza shop. A bearded white male employee is baking pizza. He removes the pizza from the oven with a metal tray, places it into a red takeaway box, closes the lid, and then hands it to a customer with a warm smile. Final shot: over-the-shoulder perspective.

prompts.title: 室内排球比赛
prompts.prompt: A women's volleyball match in a spacious indoor gym with an arched wooden ceiling and large windows. The stands are full of cheering spectators, and colorful banners hang on the back wall. The blue and green teams exchange intense rallies while players shout to communicate. The green team fails to save the ball, and an off-screen whistle blows. Cut to a close-up of a middle-aged female coach with short blonde hair, metal-framed glasses, and a green jacket. She watches intently, then lowers her head in frustration. Background music: energetic rhythmic track.

prompts.title: 街头舞蹈对决（15s 多段）
prompts.prompt: Generate a 15-second photorealistic street dance battle at night. The urban street has reflective wet pavement, neon lights, and a thin mist. A group of young dancers forms a semicircle. The first 5 seconds focus on one dancer performing challenging solo floor moves. The remaining 10 seconds show the full group performing synchronized choreography combining breaking, popping, locking, and hip-hop. Use a smooth, stable cinematic camera with realistic physics and accurate body proportions.

prompts.title: 洞穴探索第一视角
prompts.prompt: First-person POV handheld footage with slight natural shake. The only light comes from a headlamp, illuminating damp mossy walls. The camera moves through a narrow tunnel; the hand occasionally enters the frame. Audio captures heavy breathing, footsteps on wet soil, and raw on-location sounds. When the tunnel opens, the camera pauses, then pans slowly left to right over glowing semi-transparent crystals. Footsteps hit rocks with sharp clacks that echo through the cavern. The explorer exhales in awe as the sound swirls and fades.

prompts.title: 骑士入洞（多镜头）
prompts.prompt: A multi-shot sequence of a knight in silver armor. Shot 1: Wide shot as he enters a dark cave with a torch. Shot 2: Close-up of his nervous eyes. Shot 3: He draws his sword, which glows blue. Low-angle tracking shot, 2K resolution. Sound of crackling fire and echoing footsteps.

prompts.title: 蝴蝶灯光钢琴家
prompts.prompt: Cinematic butterfly lighting. Medium shot of a handsome pianist wearing a simple, elegant black suit. His fingers move across the keys with precision and emotion. Audience noise from a concert hall in the background. Shallow depth of field, warm spotlight.

prompts.title: 稳定器长镜头：咖啡馆到地铁
prompts.prompt: Steadicam long take following a man from a warm, yellow-lit café into a cool-toned, busy street. He pushes the door open, walks through traffic with cars creating light trails, and finally descends a dim subway staircase. The lighting transitions smoothly from warm indoor light to natural outdoor light, then to fluorescent subway lighting, all in a single continuous shot.

prompts.title: 香港复古电影风格（王家卫）
prompts.prompt: 90s Hong Kong art cinema style with retro grain, yellow-green tint, and step-printing effect. A man or woman in a khaki trench coat listens silently at a rain-soaked red phone booth. Extreme close-ups capture subtle lip trembles and restrained emotion as neon reflections flicker across the face. The character hangs up and walks into the rainy night crowd, with motion blur and step-printing creating a smeared, dreamlike effect. Handheld camera simulation, shallow depth of field.

prompts.title: 绿幕格斗场景（参考迁移）
prompts.prompt: Make the characters from Image 1 and Image 2 fight using the movements from the green-screen reference video. Setting: abandoned parking lot. Add visual effects during combat. Dynamic camera angles, realistic impact physics, cinematic quality.
prompts.notes: 需要 2 张人物图 + 1 段绿幕动作参考视频

prompts.title: 雪地近身格斗
prompts.prompt: A short-haired female agent in tactical winter gear engages in close-quarters combat with a mercenary at a snowy military base. The mercenary throws a punch; she dodges swiftly and counters with a powerful elbow strike to his face mask, followed by a heavy knee to the stomach. Impact shows visible shockwave ripples, and sweat and saliva fly through the air as the enemy's body folds from the blow. The camera follows the action with dynamic handheld movement. Cold breath vapor rises, textures are gritty, and high-contrast lighting emphasizes the intensity.

prompts.title: 北欧雪地追逐（人狼对峙）
prompts.prompt: Realistic Nordic snowy night. A man runs fast through deep snow, tracked closely from behind at foot level. A wolf chases him, maintaining a strong sense of speed. The man trips and rolls; the wolf lunges at him. A border collie jumps in, knocking the wolf aside. The animals wrestle; the wolf breaks free and howls. Multiple wolves slowly surround the man and dog. Close-up on the dog as the owner slowly sits up. Background music: tense and evolving with the action.

prompts.title: 赛博朋克刺客
prompts.prompt: Cyberpunk style, game CGI, dark city corner. A young assassin fights multiple enemies with a lightsaber. The camera rapidly pulls back to show the surrounding foes. The assassin moves fluidly, defeating enemies one by one. Enemies collapse as the sequence stays fast but smooth. Teleportation-style visual effects blend with cinematic transitions. The assassin ends by looking directly at the camera.

prompts.title: 涩谷跑酷冲刺
prompts.prompt: Single continuous cinematic shot in Shibuya. A schoolgirl sprints at extreme speed, weaving along crosswalks and walls. The camera moves low and close to the ground, following her every leap, roll, and jump. City lights streak below as she lands and rolls forward. Sound mixes daytime street noise, 8-bit video sounds, and shamisen strings.

prompts.title: 霓虹城市追逐
prompts.prompt: High-energy cinematic chase at night in a neon-lit city. A lone character sprints through rain-soaked streets while police drones and headlights blur past. Quick cuts show close-ups of eyes, boots splashing puddles, and wide traffic shots. The character vaults barriers, slides across car hoods, and dodges explosions. Handheld camera style with motion blur and dynamic lighting. The sequence ends in slow motion as he leaps off a rooftop with city lights streaking beneath him.

prompts.title: AAA 游戏级格斗
prompts.prompt: They meet in the dead of night and engage in a fight. The fighting style is incredibly flashy, the atmosphere is tense, and the camera work is cinematic. It's like a promotional trailer for a AAA game, featuring CG and Unreal Engine 5.

prompts.title: 战场战术动作
prompts.prompt: The man from reference image 1 as the protagonist, agile and athletic, running through a battlefield under a hail of bullets while engaging in intense tactical shooting. Visual Style: Cinematic quality with strong Orange and Teal color grading, high contrast, and visible film grain. Dynamic Details: Distinct muzzle flashes from the gun. Bullets striking surrounding objects create flying rubble and sparks. Smoke and shockwaves from explosions fill the background. Camera Movement: Handheld Camera style tracking shot, shaking violently alongside the character, with occasional snap zooms to create extreme tension. Character Performance: The protagonist has determined eyes; his actions are filled with power and speed, perfectly replicating the vibe of a Hollywood action superstar.

prompts.title: 花样滑冰双人赛
prompts.prompt: A live performance of competitive pairs figure skating. A low-angle camera follows the skaters, showing ice chips and reflections. During the spin section, the male skater miscalculates briefly, and the female skater adjusts to guide him back into rhythm. They perform a seamless lift with clean, stable lines, followed by synchronized jumps with straight postures, decisive landings, and perfect audio-visual sync. The female wears a dark blue skirt, and the male wears competitive sportswear.

prompts.title: 好莱坞夜雨赛车（多镜头）
prompts.prompt: Hollywood professional racing style at night in the rain. Shot 1 (00–05s): Close-up inside the veteran driver's car as rain lashes the windshield. He stays calm, nods, and mouths 'Let's go.' Shot 2 (05–10s): Close-up inside the rival car; the younger driver grips the wheel tightly, breathing heavily, whispering 'Focus.' Shot 3 (10–15s): Wide action shot as the green lights trigger both cars to accelerate on wet asphalt, spraying water into the camera. Motion blur turns stadium lights into streaks of color.

prompts.title: 武侠对决（白衣 vs 黑衣）
prompts.prompt: An Eastern Wuxia-style duel between a grandmaster in white and a grandmaster in black on an ancient stone platform. Shot 1: Both clash at high speed, leaving afterimages as sparks and a ring-shaped shockwave erupt. The flagstone cracks, debris and rubble fly. Shot 2: They soar into the air, striking amid falling boulders and shattered pillars, with dust and air distortion emphasizing destructive force. Shot 3: Both release ultimate moves, cyan and red energy orbs collide, triggering an earth-shattering explosion. Epic score enhances the cinematic intensity.

prompts.title: 竹林雨中剑客
prompts.prompt: A white-clad swordsman faces a straw-cloaked swordsman in a bamboo forest under heavy rain. The camera slowly pans, shifting focus between raindrops and sword hilts, building tension. Thunder flashes, and they charge simultaneously. Side-view shot captures mud-splattered footsteps, then a slow-motion weapon clash shows circular shockwaves scattering raindrops and bamboo leaves. The scene resumes normal speed with both landing back-to-back as the straw-cloaked swordsman's hat splits open, ending abruptly with dramatic impact.

prompts.title: 风筝跑酷长镜头
prompts.prompt: A Chinese youth flies a kite through crowded streets, leaps up steps, flips, lands, and dashes toward a high platform for a difficult jump. A drumbeat erupts as he lands. The entire sequence is a single continuous shot with fluid movements, realistic weight, inertia, and landing cushioning. Style transition: 0–5s in Makoto Shinkai style with bright, saturated colors and moist reflections; 6–10s in ink-wash style with simplified buildings, speed lines, and ink shockwaves visualizing drumbeats.

prompts.title: 深海生物发光潜水
prompts.prompt: First-person POV dive footage. A scuba diver descends into a pitch-black ocean. The only light is the diver's torch cutting a narrow beam into the dark. At depth, the torch clicks off. Total darkness for two seconds. Then — faint blue pulses. Bioluminescent creatures begin appearing in the void: a jellyfish drifts past, trailing light. A school of fish materialises as a glowing spiral. The diver reaches out slowly; the fish scatter like sparks. Camera pans across the dark to reveal a vast structure of glowing coral below. Slow exhale audible on the soundtrack. No music.

prompts.title: 城市日转夜延时
prompts.prompt: Locked-off wide shot from a high vantage point overlooking a dense city. Time-lapse: morning light sweeps across the skyline, shadows rotate, clouds roll through in fast motion, afternoon haze settles, and then the city lights ignite one cluster at a time as dusk falls. Final ten seconds slow to real time: the fully lit city at night, a helicopter tracking slowly across frame. Subtle ambient city drone on the soundtrack. No cuts. One continuous locked shot.

prompts.title: 追风者车载镜头
prompts.prompt: Handheld dashcam-style footage from inside a vehicle driving toward a massive tornado on a flat American plain. The sky is yellow-green. The funnel is fully formed and tracking left to right across the road ahead. Radio chatter is audible over wind noise. The driver's hand enters frame to adjust the camera angle. Rain begins — light at first, then heavy. Wipers struggle. Lightning strikes ahead. Cut to exterior wide shot: the vehicle, small against the vast sky, continues toward the storm. Audio mix: raw wind, static radio, rain intensity building.

prompts.title: 北极光延时
prompts.prompt: Locked-off wide shot, Iceland or Norway, winter. Foreground: a lone cabin with a single amber window glowing. Background: dark sky over a snow-covered plain. Time-lapse begins. The aurora emerges — first a pale green ribbon, then sheets of green and violet ripple across the sky, folding and expanding. Stars are visible behind the curtains of light. A silhouetted figure steps out of the cabin and looks up. Time-lapse slows to real time for the final five seconds. Complete silence except for a low ambient wind tone.

prompts.title: 山顶日出时刻
prompts.prompt: Documentary wide shot. A solo hiker crests a mountain ridge at dawn, silhouetted against an enormous orange sky. She stops. The camera is locked-off and distant — she is a small figure against the scale of the landscape. She sets down her pack. After a moment, she raises both arms. The camera holds. Wind moves through the frame. Slow push-in begins, very gradual — from wide establishing to a medium shot over her shoulder, looking out at the range below, still bathed in first light. No music. Only wind and the crunch of boots on gravel settling into stillness.

prompts.title: 雨夜便利店
prompts.prompt: Single continuous shot. A young woman in an oversized hoodie pushes open a convenience store door. Rain streaks the glass behind her. Warm fluorescent light floods over her face. She walks slowly down the snack aisle, trailing one finger along the shelves. She stops, picks up a cup of instant noodles, reads the label, puts it back. She stands still for a moment. Camera holds on her face — neutral expression, eyes slightly distant. She grabs the noodles again and walks to the counter. Wide shot from outside the glass as she pays, rain blurring the frame. No music. Only ambient store sounds and rain.

prompts.title: 屋顶日出瑜伽
prompts.prompt: A woman practices yoga alone on a high rooftop at sunrise. City skyline stretches behind her, golden hour light catching her silhouette. Camera begins on a slow crane shot from below the roofline, rising until the full cityscape is revealed behind her. She moves through a sun salutation sequence. Each transition is fluid and deliberate. Shallow depth of field keeps the background a soft bokeh of warm light and steel. No music. Only ambient wind and distant city hum.

prompts.title: 深夜拉面馆
prompts.prompt: Single continuous Steadicam shot. A ramen shop at 1am — near empty. One salaryman sits at the counter, hunched over his bowl. Steam rises. The chef moves behind the counter with practiced economy: ladle lifts broth, noodles are pulled from the pot, toppings placed with care. Camera tracks along the counter from the kitchen end to the customer. Close-up: the salaryman lifts his chopsticks, takes his first bite. He exhales. His shoulders drop slightly. Camera holds. Background audio: low exhaust fan hum, distant rain, the faint sound of a late train.

prompts.title: 外星丛林探索
prompts.prompt: A team of explorers moves cautiously through a dense alien jungle, bioluminescent plants glowing softly around them. The camera pans and tilts to reveal enormous alien trees, mist rising from the ground, and strange creatures watching from a distance. The explorers wear advanced exosuits, and their lights cut through the fog, revealing textures of unknown flora and fauna.

prompts.title: 蒸汽朋克飞艇大战
prompts.prompt: A massive steampunk airship engages in battle above a city. Smoke and steam fill the sky, with smaller airships darting around. Explosions throw sparks into the air. Crew members operate mechanical weaponry, levers, and pulleys with precision. Camera angles shift dynamically to show the scale of the battle, the intricate gears of the ship, and the tension of the fight.

prompts.title: 黎明武士决斗
prompts.prompt: Two samurai face each other at the crest of a misty mountain at dawn. The first light hits their blades as they bow, eyes locked. Each movement is deliberate and slow, the wind rustling through nearby cherry blossoms. Close-up on hands gripping hilts, then a wide shot showing the mist rolling over the valley below. The duel begins with a flurry of precise strikes, sparks flying from blade clashes.

prompts.title: 魔法图书馆
prompts.prompt: A young mage enters a colossal, enchanted library. Endless shelves stretch into the misty heights. Floating candles and glowing books illuminate the space. The camera sweeps upward, revealing a spiraling staircase and floating staircases. Books flutter like birds. A soft, magical hum fills the air. The mage reaches for a levitating tome, triggering a cascade of sparkling light.

prompts.title: 巨型机甲 vs 龙
prompts.prompt: A towering mech engages in battle with a massive dragon atop a crumbling city. Flames and smoke billows, debris scatters. The mech fires energy beams, which the dragon dodges with agile flips. Camera angles switch between wide establishing shots and intense close-ups of the mech and dragon. Lightning crackles as their powers clash, creating dramatic lighting and cinematic tension.

prompts.title: 抽象流体艺术
prompts.prompt: Abstract fluid art in electric blue and molten gold. Two liquids collide in slow motion, creating explosive patterns. Macro lens captures every droplet and ripple. The colors swirl and merge, creating new patterns with each frame. Black background, dramatic studio lighting, 4K ultra-high definition.

prompts.title: 超现实梦境序列
prompts.prompt: An Escher-inspired impossible architecture sequence, Inception-style reality folding, Studio Ghibli whimsy. A figure walks up stairs that loop back on themselves. Buildings fold and unfold. The sky is below, the ground is above. Seamless transitions between impossible spaces. Surreal, dreamlike quality, cinematic color grading.

prompts.title: 音乐录影带美学
prompts.prompt: A lone performer stands in a vast, dark arena. Volumetric lighting cuts through fog, creating dramatic rays. Visible sound waves emanate from the performer, distorting the air. The camera slowly circles as the light show intensifies. Epic concert atmosphere, cinematic quality, 4K.

prompts.title: ASMR 护肤品特写
prompts.prompt: Create a vertical ASMR video with no music, focusing on macro details. A light blue skincare gel bottle sits on glass. A pale, elegant hand gently taps the glass, producing crisp fingernail tapping sounds. The hand picks up the bottle and slowly twists the cap, with the rotation sound clearly audible. A spoon scoops a portion of gel and drops it onto the glass with a soft 'plop,' showing dense gel with tiny air bubbles. Dramatic cool lighting from behind makes the gel glow like a gemstone. The hand presses onto the gel, spreading it in circular motions.

prompts.title: 手部 ASMR 第一视角
prompts.prompt: A first-person ASMR video featuring hands. Close-up shots show a pair of slender hands gently interacting with different objects in sequence: scratching frosted glass, rubbing plush fabric, tapping an acrylic board, squeezing bubble wrap, and brushing a wooden comb. The finger movements are slow and gentle, and the trigger sounds are purely natural with no background music.

prompts.title: 微型烹饪序列
prompts.prompt: A miniature cooking video on a pure black background with dramatic top lighting. Show full-sized hands carefully placing a tiny cutting board and a fingernail-sized knife. Use elegant classical music as background. The hands slice a tiny garlic clove precisely, add a micro drop of olive oil to a mini frying pan over a tea candle, and crack a small quail egg into the pan. Use a tiny spatula to nudge the egg, then plate a miniature sunny-side-up egg. Highlight crisp micro sounds and sync them with the music.

prompts.title: 和牛牛排特写

prompts.title: 机械工坊小机器人（OpenAI 官方 Shot List 样板）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Hand-painted 2D/3D hybrid animation with soft brush textures, warm tungsten lighting, and tactile stop-motion feel. Mid-2000s storybook animation aesthetic—cozy, imperfect, mechanical charm. Watercolor wash, painterly textures, warm–cool balance, filmic motion blur.

Inside cluttered workshop with gear-laden shelves and blueprints. Small round robot sits on wooden bench, dented body with mismatched patches. Large glowing blue eyes flicker as it fiddles with humming light bulb.

Cinematography: Medium close-up, slow push-in with parallax from hanging tools. 35mm virtual lens, shallow DOF softening background. Warm overhead practical key; cool window spill. Gentle, whimsical, slightly suspenseful mood.

Actions:
- Robot taps bulb; sparks crackle
- Flinches, dropping bulb, eyes widen
- Bulb tumbles in slow motion; catches it
- Steam escapes chest—relief and pride
- Robot says: "Almost lost it… but I got it!"

Background Sound: Rain, ticking clock, soft mechanical hum, faint bulb sizzle.
prompts.notes: Sora 2 官方推荐分层结构：Style → Scene → Cinematography → Actions（按 beats）→ Sound

prompts.title: 70 年代屋顶浪漫（OpenAI 官方）
prompts.prompt:
Style: 1970s romantic drama, shot on 35mm film with natural flares, soft focus, warm halation. Slight gate weave and handheld micro-shake evoke vintage intimacy. Warm Kodak-inspired grade; light halation on bulbs; film grain and soft vignette for period authenticity.

At golden hour, brick tenement rooftop transforms into small stage. Laundry lines strung with white sheets sway in wind. Mismatched fairy bulbs hum overhead. Young woman in flowing red silk dress dances barefoot, curls glowing. Partner—sleeves rolled, suspenders loose—claps along.

Cinematography: Medium-wide shot, slow dolly-in from eye level. 40mm spherical lens, shallow focus isolating couple from skyline. Golden natural key with tungsten bounce; edge from fairy bulbs. Nostalgic, tender, cinematic mood.

Actions:
- She spins; dress flares catching sunlight
- Woman (laughing): "See? Even the city dances with us tonight."
- He steps in, catches her hand, dips her into shadow
- Man (smiling): "Only because you lead."
- Sheets drift across frame, briefly veil skyline before parting

Background Sound: Natural ambience only—wind, fabric flutter, street noise, muffled music. No added score.
prompts.notes: 黄金时段+对白+实景拍片质感的官方样板，Style 段锁定胶片美学

prompts.title: 通勤站台超精细参数化（OpenAI 官方）
prompts.prompt:
Format & Look: Duration 4s; 180° shutter; digital capture emulating 65mm photochemical contrast; fine grain; subtle halation on speculars; no gate weave.

Lenses & Filtration: 32mm / 50mm spherical primes; Black Pro-Mist 1/4; slight CPL rotation to manage glass reflections on train windows.

Grade/Palette: Highlights—clean morning sunlight with amber lift. Mids—balanced neutrals with slight teal cast in shadows. Blacks—soft, neutral with mild lift.

Lighting & Atmosphere: Natural sunlight from camera left (07:30 AM). 4×4 ultrabounce silver; negative fill from opposite wall. Gentle mist; train exhaust drift.

Location & Framing: Urban commuter platform at dawn. Foreground—yellow safety line, coffee cup. Midground—silhouetted passengers in haze. Background—arriving train braking.

Wardrobe: Mid-30s traveler, navy coat, backpack, holding phone loosely.

Sound: Diegetic only—rail screech, train brakes, muffled announcement, ambient hum, footsteps, paper rustle.
prompts.notes: Sora 2 的「制作蓝皮书」级提示词模板：Format → Lenses → Grade → Lighting → Location → Wardrobe → Sound

prompts.title: LTX 单段 prose 样板:岩岸浪花
prompts.prompt: The turquoise waves crash against the dark, jagged rocks of the shore, sending white foam spraying into the air. prompts.notes: 官方推荐:单段 4-8 句自然流动 prose,present tense,literal precise

prompts.title: LTX screenplay 格式:小镇新闻报道
prompts.prompt: EXT. SMALL TOWN STREET – MORNING – LIVE NEWS BROADCAST. The shot opens on a news reporter standing in front of cordoned-off cars, yellow caution tape fluttering behind him. Warm early sun reflects off the camera lens. The reporter, composed but visibly excited, looks directly into the camera, microphone in hand. 'Thank you, Sylvia — this morning, here in the quiet town of New Castle, Vermont, black gold has been found!' He gestures toward the field behind him. The camera pans right, slowly revealing a construction site. With a sudden roar, a geyser of oil erupts from the ground. Workers cheer, the black stream glistening in the morning light. The camera shakes slightly through the chaos.
prompts.notes: LTX 独家技巧:screenplay 格式(EXT./INT. + 镜头描述 + 角色台词)在对话场景上效果惊艳
